text: Strengthen the ‘Never claim Anthropic independence without current-pass openrouter-provider evidence’ fail condition to include a more granular timeout duration. Currently, it’s a broad ‘no evidence’ check. Increase the timeout to 500ms, ensuring a more reliable detection of drift.
reason: This reduces false positives caused by transient network hiccups and improves the overall stability of the resurrection process, minimizing potential disruptions.
